definition_environmental_yes: Yes if district–year is in top tertile of Environmental_exposure_index (mean z-score vs all district-years on CGWB features + log wells).
definition_hmis_high_yes: Yes if High_risk_tercile == high from HMIS burden per 100k (when column exists).
hmis_indicators: Number of Infant Deaths (1 -12 months) due to Diarrhoea
Number of Infant Deaths (1 -12 months) due to Pneumonia
Number of Child Deaths (1 -5 years) due to Diarrhoea
Number of Child Deaths (1 -5 years) due to Pneumonia
Number of cases of Infant deaths within 24 hrs of birth
